name: mcp-task-orchestrator

agent_c_star.comment: 1217 findings: 0 critical, 263 high, 184 medium, 770 low. Obfuscation detected!. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 15. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 15/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 1217 scanner findings. Rejected at 90% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.

pm_override.reason: PM override: Python MCP task orchestration server (archived repo, 24 stars). 0 injection patterns, 0 critical findings. 12 obfuscation findings are from .claude/hooks/ shell scripts (agent-interruption-detector.sh, cleanup-reminder.sh, etc.) and template system hooks (hooks/executor.py, hooks/registry.py) which use dynamic code patterns common in hook/plugin systems. 1,217 total findings from 509 files dominated by file_ops (770, from task state management), dangerous_calls (234, from subprocess in hooks), env_access (175, from config reading). All legitimate orchestration tool patterns. Repo is archived (read-only), eliminating ongoing supply chain risk.
